doc_name: Why AI Isn’t Transforming Finance Yet

chunks.text: Christian Gralingen The Research The authors engaged in two complementary research streams. One was a multiyear program of action design research conducted with organizations undergoing digital transformation that focused on how leadership work evolves under conditions of technological and market uncertainty. The other,﻿ a study of how AI is introduced into finance functions and how […]
